title: decide_artifact
description: The ranked selection of ENRICH/GAP items to ticket, highest-value first.

selected.description: Chosen items, ranked by (# intents × mechanicalness).

room.description: Exact room file path to edit (or new room path for a GAP).

gate.description: One sentence naming the gate to install.

rationale.description: Why this ranking / why the top item first.

summary_markdown.description: Human-readable decision delivered to the transport.
